steps.title: Spot the defining contrast
steps.content: The passage contrasts “Embrace,” a highly abstract sculpture, with other pieces where viewers can “easily” perceive familiar objects. The key signal: realistic depiction makes objects easy to recognize, whereas abstract geometry does not.

steps.title: Match the right action
steps.content: ”Identify” means to recognize or determine what something is—the natural action when viewing clearly depicted, familiar objects. The other choices (reveal, remember, ignore) describe unrelated actions that don't fit this meaning. That matches choice D — D is correct.
